speakers.tapHint: Tap a card to view their full profile

faq.title:
Frequently
asked
faq.subtitle: Everything about session content, how to join, and how to prepare.
faq.contactBody: Email the events team — we reply within 24 hours.

what-is.question: How does the session work?
what-is.answer: Each event is a hands-on English workshop: a short opener, small-group practice, and live tutor feedback. You'll speak and interact more than you listen to theory.

who-for.question: What level is this for?
who-for.answer: Working professionals from intermediate level up — you understand basic English but want more confidence at work. No prior 1-on-1 tutoring required.

prepare.question: What should I prepare beforehand?
prepare.answer: A laptop or phone with a working mic, stable internet (if online), and a notebook. Bring 1–2 real work situations you'd like to practice for more targeted feedback.

online.question: How do I join online?
online.answer: After registering, you'll get a confirmation email with a Mezon room link. Log in to Mezonly, join 5 minutes early, and turn on your mic when prompted.

in-person.question: What should I know for in-person attendance?
in-person.answer: Arrive 10–15 minutes before doors open for check-in. Bring a notebook and water. Dress comfortably — the session is built around speaking practice.

certificate.question: Do I get a certificate?
certificate.answer: Yes. Attendees who complete the session receive a digital certificate from Mezonly via email within 3 business days after the event.

maIelts.name: Mai Anh
maIelts.bio: Mai Anh has coached hundreds of working professionals on IELTS Speaking and everyday communication. Her sessions focus on real-world fluency and confidence in front of an audience.

jamesNative.name: James O'Connor
jamesNative.bio: James brings over a decade of corporate English coaching across multinational teams. He specializes in meetings, emails, and presentations with a native speaker's perspective.

emmaCoach.name: Emma Wilson
emmaCoach.bio: Emma helps learners break speaking barriers through pronunciation drills, role-play, and personalized feedback. Her workshops are built around hands-on practice.

davidToeic.name: David Brown
davidToeic.bio: David focuses on speaking technique and natural answer structures. Many of his students see measurable TOEIC Speaking gains after a few targeted sessions.
